title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: HILLSBORO DENTAL CLINIC DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides preventative, general, and emergency dental care (exams, fillings, and simple extractions), dental hygiene services, and pediatric dentistry. 730 SE Oak Street Suite A and B Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted, must meet income guidelines if applying for sliding scale fees. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 352-2354 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 352-2354 Program phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to make an appointment. New patients accepted as schedule permits. FEES: Vaires by service with a $30 per visit fee; accepts most insurance, including Oregon Health Plan (OHP), and offers sliding-scale fees for uninsured patients. Limited payment plans for emergencies may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Two blocks south of SE 8th Avenue stop on TriMet bus #57 Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry Periodontics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO DENTAL CLINIC
